anchors.navigation_summary: This section introduces the 2024 Q1 report for Jinlihua Electric (300069), confirming the data is unaudited. It lists key financial metrics including operating revenue of 27,407,327.33 yuan, a 147.89% year-over-year increase. The section also clarifies that there are no non-recurring gains or losses reclassified as recurring items.

anchors.summary: This table details significant changes in balance sheet items. Transactional financial assets decreased by 34.85% due to the recovery of bank wealth management products. Other non-current assets increased by 33.21% due to new prepaid engineering equipment payments. Short-term borrowings rose by 100% to replenish working capital, while contract liabilities increased by 73.99% due to prepayments from new customers.

anchors.navigation_summary: This table details significant changes in balance sheet items. Transactional financial assets decreased by 34.85% due to the recovery of bank wealth management products. Other non-current assets increased by 33.21% due to new prepaid engineering equipment payments. Short-term borrowings rose by 100% to replenish working capital, while contract liabilities increased by 73.99% due to prepayments from new customers.

anchors.summary: This section explains income statement fluctuations. Operating revenue rose 147.89% driven by the recovery of insulator and drama business sectors. Operating costs increased by 119.81% in line with revenue. Other income surged by 364.16% due to deferred income recognition from drama business, while investment income improved by 168.00% as prior year losses were absent.

anchors.summary: This section details the shareholder structure as of the reporting period. Shanxi Red Sun Tourism Development Co., Ltd. holds the largest stake at 15.02%, followed by Beijing Baize Changrui Enterprise Management Center at 14.18%. It notes that Changzhi Hongjiuzhou Trading is a 100% subsidiary of Shanxi Red Sun and that certain shareholders are acting in concert. Specific details on margin financing holdings for shareholders Wang Kefei and Zhang Zhaolong are also provided.

This table details significant changes in balance sheet items. Transactional financial assets decreased by 34.85% due to the recovery of bank wealth management products. Other non-current assets increased by 33.21% due to new prepaid engineering equipment payments. Short-term borrowings rose by 100% to replenish working capital, while contract liabilities increased by 73.99% due to prepayments from new customers.

This section explains income statement fluctuations. Operating revenue rose 147.89% driven by the recovery of insulator and drama business sectors. Other income surged by 364.16% due to deferred income recognition from drama business, while investment income improved by 168.00% as prior year losses were absent.

This table analyzes cash flow variations. Net cash from operating activities turned negative at -10,872,208.90 yuan, a 215.29% decline due to increased production expenses and payments for acceptance guarantees. Investing activities cash outflow increased by 149.37% due to new engineering payments. Financing activities showed a net inflow of 5,796,716.96 yuan from new short-term bank loans.

This section details the shareholder structure as of the reporting period. Shanxi Red Sun Tourism Development Co., Ltd. holds the largest stake at 15.02%, followed by Beijing Baize Changrui Enterprise Management Center at 14.18%. （1）货币资金期末余额 1280.82万元，比期初减少 44.55%，主要原因是投资支出增加。
（2）交易性金融资产期末余额 112.66万元，比期初增长 100%，主要原因是公司本期开展 PVC套期保值业务。
（3）应收账款期末余额 2449.25万元，比期初增长 84.54%，主要原因是应收产品销售款增加。

（4）应收账款融资期末余额 23176.08万元，比期初增长 56.01%，主要原因是应收票据增加。
（5）预付账款期末余额 5939.52万元，比期初增长 141.88%，主要原因是预付采购款增加。
（6）存货期末余额 19681.71万元，比期初增长 30.44%，主要原因是库存商品增加。
（7）其他流动资产期末余额 0万元，比期初减少 100%，主要原因是增值税留抵税额减少。

（8）固定资产期末余额 210759.39万元，比期初增长 55.84%，主要原因是技改项目预转固。
（9）在建工程期末余额 5443.58万元，比期初减少 93.49%，主要原因是技改项目预转固.
（10）其他非流动资产期末余额 62.02万元，比期初增长 100%，主要原因是工程预付款增加。
（11）短期借款期末余额 22088.63万元，比期初增长 100%，主要原因是日常经营借款增加。

（12）应付票据期末余额 7729.89万元，比期初增加 1305.44%，主要原因是本期公司开具应付票据支付采购款。
（13）预收款项和合同负债期末余额合计 4882.12万元，比期初增加 39.56%，主要原因是预收产品销售款增加。
（14）其他流动负债期末余额 556.76万元，比期初增加 41.19%，主要原因是合同负债增加，销项税金增加。

（15）专项储备期末余额 99.52万元，比期初增加 100%，主要原因是期末未使用安全管理费增加。

（2）其他收益本期发生额 32.99万元，同比减少 35.71%，主要原因是本期摊销递延收益减少。
